name: Primăria Municipiului Câmpina
description: As a vital pillar of our community, the Câmpina City Hall is dedicated to fostering youth initiatives and local talent. Their institutional partnership provides our team with essential civic support, helping us proudly represent our city in every robotics competition we attend.

name: CJE Prahova
description: The Prahova County Student Council is the leading voice for students in our region. Their partnership amplifies our educational initiatives, advocates for STEM education, and helps us connect with a broad network of passionate, forward-thinking youth.

name: Câmpina TV
description: Keeping our community connected and informed, Câmpina TV is our trusted media partner. Thanks to their dedicated coverage, we are able to share our robotics journey, technological milestones, and community outreach with the entire local area.
